(Amended) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defts To Provide Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Poduction Of Documents
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Continued To Dec-10-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF MARIA JOYA's (Amended) Motion To Compel Defendants To Provide Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Poduction Of Documents is continued to December 10, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 4, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and opposition papers. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
